name: Clam Chowder, New England Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine clams, their liquid, and water; bring to a boil.
2. Drain clams, reserving the liquid. Remove clams from shells and chop the meat; set aside.
3. In butter, fry pork with onions until onions are clear.
4. Add potatoes and the liquid from the clams. Simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Stir in Half & Half, basil, parsley, thyme, and seasonings.
6. Heat through.
7. Serve hot.
